retrieved_result: How Many Cards Are in a Skip Bo Deck? \"Hobbies & Games Card Games Q: How Many Cards Are in a Skip Bo Deck? A: Quick Answer Skip-Bo, produced by Mattel, is played with a deck of 162 cards. The majority of the deck is comprised of 12 sets of cards numbered 1-12, which make up 144 of the 162 total. The remaining 18 cards are wild \"\"Skip-Bo
Decision_Reason: The page discusses a Skip-Bo card deck and has no relevance to easy DIY room decoration ideas.

history.title: How Many Cards Are in a Skip Bo Deck?
history.description: "Hobbies & Games Card Games Q: How Many Cards Are in a Skip Bo Deck? A: Quick Answer Skip-Bo, produced by Mattel, is played with a deck of 162 cards. The majority of the deck is comprised of 12 sets of cards numbered 1-12, which make up 144 of the 162 total. The remaining 18 cards are wild ""Skip-Bo
